title: lindernia pusilla
intro: Lindernia pusilla, also known as false lip or small false lip, is a low-growing, perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Linderniaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing coughs, and treating skin conditions like eczema and wounds. In herbal preparations, Lindernia pusilla is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
